**Task Summary**
One-paragraph description of what needs to be done.

**Files to modify**
List the files that will likely need changes.

**Definition of Done**
- [ ] Checklist item 1
- [ ] Checklist item 2
- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest tests/ -q`
